name: Egg Fu Yung
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat the eggs with salt and pepper.
2. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add vegetables (except bean sprouts) and stir-fry until tender.
3. Push the vegetables aside, make an indentation in the egg mixture, and pour it into the center of the pan.
4. Use spatula to gently fold the egg around the vegetables until fully cooked.
5. Remove from heat and mix in the fresh bean sprouts.
6. Serve hot with rice or noodles.
